title: エリザベス女王杯にむけて

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The last of the chrysanthemums are still in bloom
here in Kyoto, and we're going to see another
bloom today! Hold on, folks—the Queen
Elizabeth II Cup is about to begin!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Dober... It's finally here. I know you've been
waiting for this day.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Bright... You came.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Of course. ♪ After all...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: This is the beginning of your story, no?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Here is where your shining Mejiro legacy begins.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Yes. That's right.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Well then, I couldn't possibly miss this race! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Dober, my most kindred of spirits—I wish you the
best of luck today. Go out there and show them
what you can do.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Oh...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Air Groove.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I have been awaiting this day.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I, Air Groove the Empress, shall face you with
every fiber of my being.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: It is time for our battle, Mejiro Dober.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I've been waiting for today too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I won't hold anything back either. I'll run against
you with everything I've got!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Heh.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I shall see you on the track.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Do you still believe in my strength, even now?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't even have to think about my answer. After
all, I'll tell her as many times as she needs me to.
choice_data_list: Mejiro Dober, you are an incredible racer.
Mejiro Dober, you are an incredible racer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Right.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Then keep your eyes on me, and don't you even
think about blinking.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I will carve my name into history...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: And take flight towards my new legacy!
